mapper.insert: insert into tbl_subscription (member_id, tier, billing_cycle, status, expires_at) values (#{memberId}, #{tier}::subscription_tier, #{billingCycle}, #{status}::subscription_status, #{expiresAt}::timestamp)
mapper.select: select id, member_id, tier, billing_cycle, status, started_at, expires_at, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_subscription where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'active' order by id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update tbl_subscription set tier = #{tier}::subscription_tier, billing_cycle = #{billingCycle}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}::timestamp, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_subscription set status = #{status}::subscription_status, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
